summary: Vertical video set to music with no speech. Secretary Noem descends the stairs of a Department of Homeland Security jet onto a tarmac, footage of a steel border wall in the desert, Noem standing beside Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum in a wood-paneled hall, and a tracking shot of Noem walking through a stone colonnade with aides. On-screen captions read about Mexico deploying 10,000 National Guard to the southern border, Noem thanking Sheinbaum for accepting deportation flights, and 'peace through strength.' It ends on an animated DHS seal on a blue background.

script.scene: Noem descends the airstairs of a Department of Homeland Security jet (DHS seal on the fuselage) onto the tarmac; a suited security detail leads, officials in sunglasses wait to greet her.

Low-angle footage of the rust-colored steel border wall stretching into the desert under blue sky; caption: 'While Mexico has deployed 10,000 National Guard to help secure our Southern border, there is still more work to be done.'

Noem (light blue suit) stands smiling beside Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum (maroon) in an ornate wood-paneled hall; caption: 'Secretary Noem thanked President Sheinbaum for accepting deportation flights.'
Slow-motion tracking shot of Noem walking through a stone colonnade flanked by aides and officials; caption: '...e showing what peace through strength really looks like.'
Animated DHS eagle seal on a textured deep-blue background.

notable_text: While Mexico has deployed 10,000 National Guard to help secure our Southern border, there is still more work to be done.
Secretary Noem thanked President Sheinbaum for accepting deportation flights.
...showing what peace through strength really looks like.
